expo.name: TandaXn
expo.description: Rotating savings circles for groups, families, and diaspora communities.

infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Use Face ID to securely sign in to TandaXn and unlock your wallet.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TandaXn uses the camera to scan QR codes for two-factor authentication setup and to capture photos for community posts and identity verification.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TandaXn accesses your photo library so you can attach images to community posts, set your profile picture, and submit identity documents.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: TandaXn needs permission to save photos to your library (e.g., receipts, QR codes, or ID documents).
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: TandaXn needs microphone access to record audio for verifying your identity and for sharing voice notes in communities.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: TandaXn needs contacts access to help you find friends already on the app and invite others.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TandaXn uses your location only when you verify a savings-goal milestone on the ground or list yourself as a Verified Provider. Location is never tracked in the background.

plugins.cameraPermission: TandaXn needs camera access to take photos of your ID and for selfie verification.

plugins.photosPermission: TandaXn needs access to your photo library to upload ID documents and profile pictures.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow TandaXn to use Face ID for secure authentication.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow TandaXn to use your location to find circles near you.

plugins.contactsPermission: Allow TandaXn to access your contacts to invite friends.
